text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: So close! I thought you had it there for a second...
choice_data_list: I'm sorry I couldn't get it for you.
I'm sorry I couldn't get it for you.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
No problem! There's no way I could have gotten it
either!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I'm starving! How about we get some carrot
ice cream on the way back?
